The minimum supported version is 12.0.0. Check the community dialects project for available legacy versions. 2026-06-10 12:19:44 - HHH90000025: PostgreSQLDialect does not need to be specified explicitly using 'hibernate.dialect' (remove the property setting and it will be selected by default) Hibernate: create table order_item ( order_item_id bigint generated by default as identity, item_id varchar(255) not null, price numeric(10,2) not null, quantity integer not null, order_id bigint not null, primary key (order_item_id) ) Hibernate: create table orders ( order_id bigint generated by default as identity, created_at timestamp(6) not null, customer_id bigint not null, order_date timestamp(6) not null, status varchar(20) not null check (status in ('PENDING','PROCESSING','SHIPPED','DELIVERED','RETURNED','CANCELLED')), total_amount numeric(10,2) not null, updated_at timestamp(6) not null, primary key (order_id) ) Hibernate: alter table if exists order_item add constraint FKt4dc2r9nbvbujrljv3e23iibt foreign key (order_id) references orders 2026-06-10 12:19:47 - Initialized JPA EntityManagerFactory for persistence unit 'default' 2026-06-10 12:19:47 - Started OrderRepositoryTest in 6.706 seconds (process running for 22.762) Hibernate: insert into orders (created_at, customer_id, order_date, status, total_amount, updated_at) values (?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?) Hibernate: insert into order_item (item_id, order_id, price, quantity) values (?, ?, ?, ?) Hibernate: select o1_0.order_id, o1_0.created_at, o1_0.customer_id, o1_0.order_date, o1_0.status, o1_0.total_amount, o1_0.updated_at from orders o1_0 where o1_0.status=?

testcase.name: testFindByCustomerIdAndStatus
testcase.system-out: Hibernate: insert into orders (created_at, customer_id, order_date, status, total_amount, updated_at) values (?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?) Hibernate: insert into order_item (item_id, order_id, price, quantity) values (?, ?, ?, ?) Hibernate: select o1_0.order_id, o1_0.created_at, o1_0.customer_id, o1_0.order_date, o1_0.status, o1_0.total_amount, o1_0.updated_at from orders o1_0 where o1_0.customer_id=? and o1_0.status=?

testcase.name: testFindByCustomerId
testcase.system-out: Hibernate: insert into orders (created_at, customer_id, order_date, status, total_amount, updated_at) values (?, ?, ?, ?, ?, ?) Hibernate: insert into order_item (item_id, order_id, price, quantity) values (?, ?, ?, ?)
